log: === ROUND 1 ===

Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

Young Red Dragon attacks Custom Lineage — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Custom Lineage — Unarmored Caster HP: 5/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Custom Lineage — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person

→ Custom Lineage — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.

→ Custom Lineage — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 13/59
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Custom Lineage — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Custom Lineage — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
